content:
$make LLVM=1 olddefconfig
$make LLVM=1 rustavailable
Rust is available!
$make LLVM=1
...
make[4]: *** No rule to make target 'net/netfilter/xt_DSCP.o', needed by 'net/netfilter/'. Stop.

Any ideas how to solve this issue?

Could you share the output of

cat .config | grep NETFILTER_XT_TARGET_DSCP

?

Dirk Behme said:

cat .config | grep NETFILTER_XT_TARGET_DSCP

root@ubuntu2404arm:~/linux# cat .config | grep NETFILTER_XT_TARGET_DSCP
CONFIG_NETFILTER_XT_TARGET_DSCP=m
root@ubuntu2404arm:~/linux# uname -a
Linux ubuntu2404arm 6.9.0-rc1+ #2 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Mon Aug 26 12:27:57 UTC 2024 aarch64 aarch64 aarch64 GNU/Linux
root@ubuntu2404arm:~/linux#

Are you sharing files from a Mac filesystem? This is one of the pairs of filenames that are the same except for case, so cloning on a default Mac filesystem doesn't work well:

pokio:linux geofft$ git ls-tree HEAD:net/netfilter | grep -i dscp
100644 blob cfa44515ab72d7a037623ec3c8b41360285867ae    xt_DSCP.c
100644 blob fb0169a8f9bbd3b03411a0287fb021042104afa9    xt_dscp.c
pokio:linux geofft$ ls net/netfilter | grep -i dscp
xt_dscp.c

I need to deal with this too ... if you want it accessible on the Mac side, I think the options are to either make a disk image that's case sensitive and mount that, or make a new partition. Or you can use a directory that's entirely within the Linux VM.

100644 blob fb0169a8f9bbd3b03411a0287fb021042104afa9    xt_dscp.c

xt_dscp.c

I need to deal with this too ... if you want it accessible on the Mac side, I think the options are to either make a disk image that's case sensitive and mount that, or make a new partition. Or you can use a directory that's entirely within the Linux VM.

Thank's for your reply, helpful:+1: Have you managed btw how to install latest kernel headers for 6.11.0-rc1+ ?

root@ubuntu2404arm:~/ovpn-dco# sudo apt-get install linux-headers-$(uname -r)
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree... Done
Reading state information... Done
E: Unable to locate package linux-headers-6.11.0-rc1
E: Couldn't find any package by glob 'linux-headers-6.11.0-rc1'
E: Couldn't find any package by regex 'linux-headers-6.11.0-rc1'
root@ubuntu2404arm:~/ovpn-dco#
Nikolai Shv has marked this topic as resolved.
